signals.raw:
Evernode-T54 AI Partnership Confirmation** | YES | MED confidence[3]  
Evernode, the largest public XRP treasury company, confirmed partnership with T54 AI for AI-based agentic finance verification on the XRP Ledger, enabling real-time yield strategies, liquidity, and risk management—a crucial system upgrade with market impact potential[3].
